frameworks.name: WASI Component Model direction
frameworks.note: This POC models manifest, capability, lifecycle, and failure controls without claiming real WASM execution.

frameworks.name: Least-privilege extension hosting
frameworks.note: Requested capabilities are compared against explicit grants before lifecycle events are accepted.

controls.risk: extension declares invalid or ambiguous authority
extension expands host authority without review
extension failure takes down the host in permissive mode

gaps.nextEvidence: Link this POC to an exercised WASM runtime command.
Exercise install, deny, quarantine, review, and recovery commands.
